endpoints.name: Add a password to a PDF
endpoints.description: Protect a PDF document with a password. Encrypt the PDF document to prevent unauthorized access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add restrictions to a PDF
endpoints.description: Add restrictions to prevent copying, printing, and modifying a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add an image watermark to a PDF
endpoints.description: Add an image watermark to each page of a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add a text watermark to a PDF
endpoints.description: Add a text watermark to each page of a PDF document. Choose from several watermark templates.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Extract pages from a PDF
endpoints.description: Extract one or more pages from a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Merge PDF documents
endpoints.description: Combine multiple PDF documents into a single PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Remove pages from a PDF
endpoints.description: Remove one or more pages from a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Remove the password from a PDF
endpoints.description: Remove the password from an encrypted PDF document. The PDF document will no longer require a password to open.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Remove the restrictions from a PDF
endpoints.description: Remove all the restrictions from a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Remove the signatures from a PDF
endpoints.description: Remove the cryptographic signatures and timestamps from a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Reverse the pages of a PDF
endpoints.description: Reverse the order of the pages of a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Rotate pages in a PDF
endpoints.description: Rotate one or more pages in a PDF document.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFBLOCKS_API_KEY}} with your PDFBLOCKS API KEY.
